cards.title: Create a parenting rota to reduce household conflict
cards.body: One couple solved constant bickering about chores by creating a simple parenting rotation system. The structured approach helped them manage responsibilities fairly after their second child was born.

cards.title: Protecting children from toxic in-laws
cards.body: If your partner's parent is unkind to them, it's wise to minimize their contact with your future children. Professional advice suggests setting firm boundaries to protect your kids from negative family dynamics.

cards.title: Sensitivity to graphic content isn't immaturity
cards.body: Teenagers who are sensitive to disturbing media content aren't immature—maturity has little to do with what you're willing to watch. Being curious about why you react differently from peers can build genuine self-awareness.

cards.title: Normalize gender and sexual fluidity in young people
cards.body: Young people benefit when we move beyond rigid binary thinking about gender and sexuality. Supporting their fluidity helps them develop healthier identities and self-understanding.

cards.title: Skipping breakfast impacts children's happiness and sleep
cards.body: Kids who skip breakfast show reduced happiness, poorer school performance, and inadequate sleep. Starting the day with a proper meal supports their overall well-being and learning.
